reasons: Public Content Envelope and delivery semantics

reproducibility.detail: GitHub Actions completed the pinned default Release Gate from a clean checkout on Linux and Windows for implementation commit 6fed399; both jobs passed and uploaded immutable reports with recorded SHA-256 digests.

static_correctness.detail: Web lint, TypeScript typecheck, production build, trust/privacy preflight and release-gate tests pass locally and in the Linux and Windows clean-checkout Release Gate.
evidence: GitHub Actions run 29490274913 Linux and Windows default gates: PASS

public_contracts.detail: Localized search, trusted identity resolution, language-aware canonical redirects, query preservation, unreviewed legacy 404 and versioned cached delivery behavior pass the complete browser smoke suite.
evidence: npm run smoke -w web: 28 passed on Windows Microsoft Edge

media_and_content_truth.detail: The new routes expose only TRUSTED_PANDA_DETAILS, label the versioned local release cached, distinguish complete and partial coverage, preserve fact status/precision/sources, render no-media states and do not expose generated legacy profiles.

browser_journeys.detail: The complete 28-test production browser suite passes with the pinned Playwright Chromium runtime in both Linux and Windows clean checkouts; local Edge runs also cover bilingual, no-JavaScript, mobile and keyboard journeys.
evidence: GitHub Actions run 29490274913: Linux Default gate PASS
GitHub Actions run 29490274913: Windows Default gate PASS
npm run smoke -w web: 28 passed locally on Windows Microsoft Edge
npm run smoke:production -w web: 28 passed locally on Windows Microsoft Edge

automated_accessibility.detail: Dynamic axe WCAG A/AA scans, retained incomplete-result annotations, keyboard behavior, 320x800 reflow, bilingual language declaration, 200-percent text resizing and reduced-motion assertions pass in pinned Playwright Chromium on Linux and Windows clean checkouts.
evidence: GitHub Actions run 29490274913 Linux and Windows Automated core WCAG checks: PASS
npm run test:accessibility -w web: 14 passed locally

visual_regression.detail: Required deterministic Linux Chromium 390x844 and 1440x900 screenshot baselines and semantic visual review are not yet recorded.

performance_budgets.detail: The production build reports 103 kB shared First Load JS, 107 kB localized Home/Atlas and 108 kB trusted Profile, all within the Slice 1 limits.
evidence: shared First Load JS: 103 kB (budget 110 kB)
localized Home and Atlas: 107 kB (budgets 140 kB and 170 kB)

staging.detail: No immutable Staging deployment is currently bound to a commit, build checksum, API deployment and Public Release identity.

human_signoff.detail: Named bilingual, keyboard, zoom, visual, Edge plus Narrator and Firefox plus NVDA sign-off is not yet recorded.

release_decision.detail: Clean-checkout automation is now complete for implementation commit 6fed399, but Level 3 immutable Staging identity, deterministic visual evidence and named human bilingual/accessibility sign-off remain incomplete. This manifest must not be interpreted as a release PASS.
